title: Generalized Anxiety Disorder-7 (GAD-7)
description: Questionnaire for screening and measuring the severity of generalized anxiety symptoms over the past two weeks.

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.text: Over the last 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by the following problems?

questions.text: Feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge
Not being able to stop or control worrying
Worrying too much about different things
Being so restless that it is hard to sit still
Feeling afraid as if something awful might happen

resultDescription: This questionnaire assesses the severity of anxiety symptoms over the past two weeks. A higher total score indicates more pronounced anxiety. The result is not a diagnosis, but it can help you better understand your current state and consider seeking professional support if needed.
